name: roblox-sync
description: Bidirectional real-time sync between Roblox Studio and VS Code. Edit your entire game—scripts, instances, and properties—from your editor and see changes instantly in Studio.

robloxSync.port.description: Port for the HTTP sync server

robloxSync.projectPath.description: Relative path within the workspace for synced files (leave empty to use workspace root)

robloxSync.pollInterval.description: How often the plugin polls for changes (seconds)

robloxSync.cursorMode.description: When on, only sync new instances after init.meta.json includes className; folder name is the instance name, not the Roblox class. When off, a folder named like a class (e.g. Part) creates that instance with defaults immediately.

robloxSync.studioInactivityTimeoutSec.description: While Studio is connected, stop the sync server if there is no Studio ping or studio-changes traffic for this many seconds (e.g. Studio closed or stuck).

robloxSync.studioPingIntervalSec.description: How often the Studio plugin should call /api/ping while connected (advertised via /api/status).
